---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce:
1. Run `lazypr ...`
2. Press `...`
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14]
- Rust version: [e.g. 1.92.0]
- lazypr version: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- Terminal: [e.g. iTerm2, Alacritty, Windows Terminal]

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or `--json` output.
